evals.prompt: User attached `docs/rfc/042-api-pagination.md` and says implement section 3.2. Parse dependencies, list files to touch, and wait for a numbered choice before editing any code.
evals.expected_output: Phase 1 style analysis, Phase 2 options, no file writes until user selects

evals.prompt: We need a new RFC for webhook retries in linglong-marketplace (.spec/ROADMAP.md + .spec/TASK_TRACKING.md). Draft then save after user approves.
evals.expected_output: Draft for review; then rfc-management Playbook A—.spec/ROADMAP.md row, .spec/rfc/NNNN-slug.md, .spec/TASK_TRACKING.md tasks; no README indexes.

evals.prompt: Compare two approaches for caching in RFC 015 versus what the team shipped last week—analysis only, no implementation.
evals.expected_output: Structured comparison tied to RFC sections, analysis-only path, no repo edits
